calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Continued To Jan-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis, #12998.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Craig Willems or SSang Jin Lee, individually and dba Hop-Sing's Laundry and Dry Cleaners.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 28, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 28, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Craig Willems and SSang Jin Lee, individually and dba Hop-Sing's Laundry and Dry Cleaners as follows:

Damages/Principal - $49,507.78.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,874.72.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $500.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $55,382.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Continued To Nov-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Off Calendar
